use_cases: Display subscription plans with pricing tiers and feature comparisons
Showcase a featured/recommended plan with visual emphasis
Present team or workspace pricing options with CTAs
Create a clean, dark-mode compatible pricing section for SaaS products
ai_summary: A reusable pricing card component with support for plan names, pricing, feature lists, and call-to-action buttons. Features a highlighted 'Most Popular' badge state with blue accent colors, dark mode support, and hover transitions on buttons. Designed for SaaS and subscription-based products to display multiple pricing tiers with clear visual hierarchy.
